Hero.description: We transform technological complexity into operational simplicity. We integrate next-generation AI, high-fidelity software engineering, and senior global talent to empower innovative organizations.

Philosophy.title: Innovation with
Philosophy.subtitle: At Aptivall, we don't just implement technology — we design competitive advantages. Our philosophy is grounded in
Philosophy.subtitleEnd: we understand that every organization has a unique DNA, and therefore our solutions are not packaged products but personalized ecosystems.

pillars.title: Boutique Service at Global Scale
pillars.description: We combine personalized attention with the execution capacity of a global engineering firm.

pillars.title: Continuous Vanguard
pillars.description: We obsess over 'what's next' so our clients never become obsolete.

pillars.title: ROI-Focused
pillars.description: Every line of code and every AI agent has a clear mission: optimize, scale, or monetize.

Services.title: Solutions Designed to
Services.subtitle: We integrate technology, talent and strategy to transform organizations into industry leaders.

services.title: Advanced AI & High-Impact Software
services.description: We develop AI solutions with video models for object identification and AI Agents with logical reasoning. We build scalable digital ecosystems and corporate video games that transform audience engagement.

services.title: Learning Ecosystems
services.description: As Open edX partners, we build enterprise-grade e-learning platforms with instructional design and H5P interactivity. Real cases: Universidad del Norte and Pfizer.

services.title: High-Impact Offshore Talent
services.description: Staff augmentation with senior engineers, AI/ML Engineers, DevOps, certified PMs (PMP/PMI) and Scrum Masters. Remote teams in Latin America ready to scale your operation.

services.title: Audiovisual Content & B2B Websites
services.description: Production of corporate videos, 2D/3D animation and special effects. Web development focused on CRO, SEO-friendly architecture and CRM integration.

CaseStudies.title: Transformation Milestones and
CaseStudies.subtitle: Global companies that trusted Aptivall to transform their operations with technology and innovation. Our track record is not measured in years, but in the success of our strategic partners.

cases.title: Continuing Medical Education
cases.desc: We developed a scientific update ecosystem for specialist physicians in Cardiology and Oncology. The project included the comprehensive customization of their corporate LMS.

cases.title: Agility in Crisis
cases.desc: We created specialized training solutions for their global sales force, focused on regulatory compliance and COVID-19 vaccine protocols.

cases.title: Process Innovation
cases.desc: We led strategic AI projects aimed at radically reducing time in content creation for sales and event project management.

cases.title: Talent Automation
cases.desc: We implemented an AI solution for recruitment. Result: 40% reduction in hiring time, automatically validating high-potential candidates.

cases.title: Industrial Safety
cases.desc: We designed high-impact gamified HSE courses. We transformed training into an interactive experience that raised retention and engagement rates.

meta.description: Discover Aptivall's 4 pillars: Innovation Lab, EdTech Studio, Global Talent and Digital Media.

hero.title: Solutions Designed to
hero.subtitle: We integrate technology, talent and strategy to transform organizations into industry leaders.

s1.title: AI, Computer Vision & Software
s1.desc: We develop AI solutions with video models for object identification and AI Agents with logical reasoning.

subA.label: Artificial Intelligence and Automation
subA.title: *Artificial Intelligence* that Solves Real Challenges
subA.text: We develop AI solutions with video models for object identification and *AI Agents* with logical reasoning capabilities. Our technology doesn't just *automate* — it *optimizes* critical processes.

features.title: Autonomous Agents and Task Bots
features.description: We implement intelligent workflows using leading tools like n8n for orchestration, and integrate advanced models like Microsoft Copilot and Claude to empower systems with reasoning capabilities, content creation, and complex process automation.

features.title: Real-Time Computer Vision
features.description: We integrate AI with your existing surveillance and security systems (Cameras/CCTV). Through regional partnerships with specialist companies, we ensure real-time analysis of elements — from anomaly detection on production lines to inventory analysis.

features.title: LLM-Powered Video Creation
features.description: We use the latest Language Models (LLMs) and generative AI tools for automated or semi-automated creation of corporate, explanatory, and marketing videos, dramatically accelerating content time-to-market.

subB.label: Software Engineering & Corporate Gaming
subB.title: *High-Impact Software* & *B2B Gamification*
subB.text: We build scalable digital ecosystems and video games for companies looking to transform engagement with their internal and external audiences.
items: Casual video games for mass engagement
Gamified resources (badges, points, rankings) for upskilling/reskilling

impact.description: Our gamification solutions transform the user experience, increasing participation and accelerating learning in B2B environments.

s2.title: Learning Ecosystems
s2.desc: As Open edX partners, we build enterprise-grade e-learning platforms with instructional design and H5P interactivity for high-complexity sectors.

subA.label: Human Capital Transformation
subA.title: *Human Capital Transformation* through Elite EdTech
subA.text: As Open edX partners, we build enterprise-grade e-learning platforms that integrate instructional design and cutting-edge technology for highly complex sectors. Our focus on interactivity is enhanced with resources like H5P.org, designing immersive learning experiences that guarantee a high retention rate. At Aptivall, we eradicate the obsolescence of corporate training. We don't just digitize; we re‑engineer the learning experience.

features.title: Surgical Instructional Design
features.description: We articulate each topic into surgically measurable learning objectives, laying the foundation for a total immersion ecosystem.

features.title: Total Immersion Ecosystem
features.description: We design interactive objects with H5P.org, real‑time self‑assessments, video lessons and playful resources that guarantee superior retention.

features.title: Gamification & Augmented Reality
features.description: We turn static slides into deep emotional experiences. We implement B2B gamification and AR for memorable learning.

features.title: Advanced Metrics
features.description: We deliver granular analysis beyond completion rates. We identify who absorbed the content best, allowing you to optimise your training investment.

cases.title: Gamified Industrial Safety
cases.desc: We designed high‑impact gamified HSE courses, transforming training into an interactive experience that raised staff engagement.

cases.title: Continuing Medical Education
cases.desc: Comprehensive customisation of their corporate LMS with cutting‑edge instructional design for training in new cardiovascular and oncology treatment technologies.

s3.title: High-Impact Talent
s3.desc: Offshore staff augmentation with senior IT and Marketing professionals in Latin America. We have a network of Project Managers specialized in leading high‑impact initiatives.

subA.title: *High-Impact Talent* for your Operation
subA.label: Staff Augmentation Offshore Profiles
subA.text: Aptivall offers rapid integration of specialized talent, aligned with our innovation pillars.

profiles.title: Senior Full Stack Developers
profiles.description: Specialized in high‑scalability environments (React, Node.js, Python).

profiles.title: AI/ML Engineers
profiles.description: Experts in Computer Vision, Video Models and corporate AI Agents development.

profiles.title: DevOps / Cloud Engineers
profiles.description: Experienced in infrastructure management on AWS, GCP or Azure.

profiles.title: Instructional Designers / EdTech Specialists
profiles.description: Focused on LMS platforms (Open edX) and gamified experiences.

profiles.title: Senior Project Managers (PMP/PMI/Scrum)
profiles.description: Leaders skilled in agile and traditional methodologies for complex technology projects.

profiles.title: Scrum Masters & Agile Coaches
profiles.description: To drive agile adoption and optimise the productivity of internal development teams.

profiles.title: B2B Content Strategists & Copywriters
profiles.description: Creation of technical content and value narratives for corporate audiences.

profiles.title: Senior SEO/SEM Specialists
profiles.description: Optimisation of visibility and performance of digital marketing campaigns.

s4.title: Audiovisual Content & B2B Websites
s4.desc: Corporate videos, 2D/3D animation, special effects and web development with CRO and SEO.

subA.label: Video, Animation & Professional Post‑Production
subA.title: High‑Impact Audiovisual Content for the B2B Sector
subA.text: We develop and produce audiovisual marketing products that consolidate your corporate message. Our offering includes video creation (including explanatory videos and professional corporate videos), video production, 2D/3D animation, advanced editing and the application of special effects, ensuring that your value communication is clear, dynamic and memorable for decision‑makers.

subB.label: Website Creation & Strategic Digital Design
subB.title: High‑Performance B2B Web Experiences Development
subB.text: We create corporate websites and landing pages that are the backbone of your digital strategy. We focus on conversion‑centered design (CRO), SEO‑friendly architecture and integration with your marketing and sales systems (CRM), ensuring that your online presence drives measurable results.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.intro: At Aptivall, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you interact with us through our website.

sections.heading: 1. Information We Collect
sections.body: We only collect information that you voluntarily provide through the contact form: name, email address, subject, and message. We do not use tracking cookies or analytics tools that collect personal data without your consent.

sections.heading: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.body: We use the information you send us solely to respond to your inquiry and, if you request it, to contact you about the services we offer. We do not use your data for automated marketing purposes or share it with third parties.

sections.heading: 3. Storage and Security
sections.body: Your data is stored securely and only for as long as necessary to manage your inquiry. We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your information against unauthorized access, loss, or alteration.

sections.heading: 4. No Tracking Cookies
sections.body: Our website does not use tracking cookies, advertising cookies, or analytics that compromise your privacy. We only use cookies strictly necessary for the technical operation of the site, which do not require your consent under current legislation.

sections.heading: 5. Your Rights
sections.body: You may request access, rectification, or deletion of your personal data at any time by writing to info@aptivall.com. We will respond to your request within a maximum of 15 business days.

sections.heading: 6. Changes to This Policy
sections.body: Any future changes to this Privacy Policy will be posted on this page. We recommend reviewing it periodically to stay informed about how we protect your information.

sections.heading: 7. Contact
sections.body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at info@aptivall.com.

TermsPage.title: Terms of Use
TermsPage.intro: Welcome to Aptivall. By accessing and using our website, you agree to comply with the following Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any of these conditions, we recommend not using the site.

sections.heading: 1. Website Use
sections.body: The content of this site is for informational purposes only regarding the services offered by Aptivall. Using the site for illegal, fraudulent activities or those that may damage the company's image is not permitted.

sections.heading: 2. Intellectual Property
sections.body: All content on the site (texts, images, logos, graphics, source code, and design) is the exclusive property of Aptivall or third parties who have authorized its use. Reproduction, distribution, or modification without prior written consent is prohibited.

sections.heading: 3. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: Aptivall is not responsible for any damages or losses that may arise from the use of the information contained on the site. While we strive to keep the information up to date, we do not guarantee the accuracy or completeness of the content.

sections.heading: 4. Third-Party Links
sections.body: This site may contain links to third-party websites (e.g., the Virtual Campus). Aptivall assumes no responsibility for the content or privacy policies of those sites.

sections.heading: 5. Data Protection
sections.body: The processing of your personal data is governed by our Privacy Policy, which we recommend you read carefully.

sections.heading: 6. Modifications
sections.body: Aptivall reserves the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Changes will take effect upon publication on this page.

sections.heading: 7. Applicable Law
sections.body: These Terms of Use are governed by the laws of the Republic of Colombia. Any dispute shall be submitted to the competent courts of Bogotá D.C.

sections.heading: 8. Contact
sections.body: If you have any questions about these Terms of Use, you can write to us at info@aptivall.com.
